# Decksmith

> A Svelte 5 presentation framework. Create interactive slideshows by editing `src/App.svelte` and running `npm start`. Built on Reveal.js-style 2D slide grids.

## Usage

Presentations are Svelte components that use `<Deck>`, `<Slide>`, `<Fragment>`, `<Notes>`, `<Markdown>`, and `<Code>` components imported from `"decksmith"`.

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Deck, Slide, Fragment, Notes, Markdown, Code } from "decksmith";
</script>

<Deck theme="obsidian" transition="slide">
  <Slide h={0} v={0}>
    <h1>Title</h1>
  </Slide>
  <Slide h={1} v={0}>
    <h2>Second Slide</h2>
    <Fragment index={0} style="fade-up"><p>First point</p></Fragment>
  </Slide>
</Deck>
```

Edit `src/App.svelte`, run `npm start`, open http://localhost:5173.

## Key Concepts

- Slides use a 2D grid: `h` (horizontal, left→right) and `v` (vertical, top→bottom sub-slides)
- Every presentation starts at `h={0} v={0}`; `h` values must be sequential with no gaps
- `<Fragment index={N}>` reveals content step-by-step; index starts at 0
- 5 built-in themes: `obsidian` (default), `air`, `dusk`, `parchment`, `ember`
- 6 transitions: `none`, `fade`, `slide`, `convex`, `concave`, `zoom`

## Docs

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Full component API, rules for code generation, selection guides — primary AI reference
- [LLM Guide](docs/llm-guide.md): Generation workflow, patterns, complete worked example
- [API Reference](docs/api-reference.md): Complete component and type reference
- [README](README.md): Project overview with all component API tables and common patterns

## Optional

- [Configuration](docs/configuration.md): All Deck config options
- [Auto-Animate](docs/auto-animate.md): Animating elements between slides
- [Scroll View](docs/scroll-view.md): Scrollable page mode
- [PDF Export](docs/pdf-export.md): Printing presentations to PDF
- [Speaker Notes](docs/speaker-notes.md): Speaker window usage
- [Code Highlighting](docs/code-highlighting.md): Line step-through syntax
- [Themes](docs/themes.md): Theme details and CSS variables
